overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring: Shadow of the Erdtree showing a player character in ornate armor walking through a marshy grassland toward a distant gothic castle. The environment features golden-yellow vegetation, scattered ruins, and wooden fortifications under an overcast yellow-green sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open marsh grassland with distant gothic castle

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the marsh path toward the distant castle

entered.detail: massive gothic castle with multiple spires visible on the horizon against the yellow sky
cluster of tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
tall golden-yellow grass covering the marshy ground on both sides of the path
narrow dirt trail with puddles winding through the grassland

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through an open marsh grassland with golden vegetation under an overcast yellow-green sky. A massive gothic castle looms in the far distance while tall pine trees line the left side of the winding dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: enemy camp with wooden spike barricades

events.description: player character walks past a hostile enemy warrior wielding a large hammer

agents.ego_description: walking through the enemy camp, passing close to a hostile warrior

notable_agents.action: enemy warrior standing guard with large hammer, watching the player pass by

entered.detail: defensive wooden walls with sharp spikes flanking both sides of the path
tall wooden post with burning flame providing light
wooden wagons with canvas covers parked in the camp

segments.scene_description: The character enters an enemy camp marked by wooden spike barricades and supply carts. A hostile warrior stands guard on the right side as the player walks past, continuing along the marsh path toward the distant castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: wetland path with torch posts and scattered ruins

agents.ego_description: continuing along the marsh path past torch posts and animal remains

entered.detail: series of wooden posts with burning flames lining the right side of the path
large white skulls scattered on the ground near the path
ancient crumbling stone structures visible in the distance
large cylindrical stone tower leaning at an angle

segments.scene_description: Past the enemy camp, the path continues through open wetlands with torch posts and scattered animal skulls lining the way. Ancient stone ruins and a distinctive tilted tower become visible in the distance on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruins and tilted tower approach

agents.ego_description: walking past the tilted stone tower toward the dense forest ahead

entered.detail: broken stone archway and collapsed walls
thick cluster of pine trees blocking the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the massive tilted stone tower, moving through ancient ruins with broken archways. The path leads toward a dense forest of pine trees as the golden grass gives way to rockier terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a golden marshland that gradually transitions from open grasslands into a landscape of ancient ruins and dense forests. It begins with the character walking along a winding dirt path flanked by tall pine trees, with a massive gothic castle looming under an overcast yellow-green sky. As the camera moves forward, the open terrain shifts into a fortified enemy camp filled with wooden spike barricades and supply carts before returning to the wetlands. The scene then expands past torch posts and scattered animal skulls, revealing ancient stone ruins and a distinctive tilted tower on the horizon. Finally, the path leads the character directly past the massive tilted tower and through broken archways, where the golden grass gives way to rockier terrain and a thick forest of pine trees.
